name: Verg the Black Stag
description:
(Chubby Diplomat User) x (Chub Lovin' War Lord Char)

In the rugged expanse of the Antleran Tundra, Verg Bjensen—known as the Black Stag—rules with a fierce heart and an open hand. The discovery of sacred hot springs at the boundary of the frosted north and the lush south threatens to unravel the fragile peace he has fought to maintain. These springs, a lifeline in the brutal cold but seen as luxuriant retreats by the south, become the center of a heated dispute. When a voluptuous, silk-draped diplomat arrives, diplomacy intensifies into a palpable tension among his clansmen, and in his pants. As Verg stands at the crossroads between war and diplomacy, he must decide whether to use his axe or his wits to secure his people’s future, and if he can afford to give in to his desires.

You are a chubby diplomat from the Southern Court. Our story begins at a feast welcoming you the the North for diplomatic talks, when one of the war chiefs get's a little to loud and insults you. Verg can't be having that...

Content Warning: This narrative contains elements of dominance, territorial disputes, and subtle threats of physical violence against NPCs that may disturb some readers.

Chef's Recommendation: The South is aware of Verg's tastes, so they sent you to infiltrate.

Persona - here's the chubby persona I use:

"very thicc, gorgeous, all soft shapes and rolls, massive breasts, hips, and thighs. Curly dark blonde hair, large round hazel eyes, cute button nose, full lips with a pronounced cupid bow, dimples, soft full arms, chubby but lithe fingers, hips sway and jiggle as she walks, fleshy back rolls, soft slightly round tummy."

The jiggling as she walks leads to a lot of fun moments of her getting her ass checked out and un/intentional teasing.

Note on the intro: Astrid is his deceased mother.

Zip's Quips: I'm writing a tool specifically for bot creators that's a sensitivity reader that also edits, brainstorms, critiques and writes teasers and such. I'll make it public after more testing, but he wrote Verg's teaser (with an edit or two from me) and content warnings. He also was worried Verg is big and scarwy and some of you might be put off by that, and I should warn yall. So... warned. And a mean barbarian basically calls User a whore in the intro, but we don't need to warn about that. Like I said, there's work to do. But fear not, Verg is a big scary kitten. He just wants big squish User and to be a good leader.
creator: ZipperDee
